channel.title: hackthebox on Sean Benson: Pentesting Lab Write Ups
channel.description: Recent content in hackthebox on Sean Benson: Pentesting Lab Write Ups

item.title: Paper
item.description: For this writeup, I will cover my experience on the HackTheBox machine Paper, a Linux system with a rating of Easy. Enumeration To begin, I run a quick nmap scan against the host to identify any services of interest. kali@kali:~$ nmap 10.10.11.143 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-03-15 23:16 EDT Nmap scan report for office.paper (10.10.11.143) Host is up (0.081s latency). Not shown: 997 closed tcp ports (conn-refused) PORT STATE SERVICE 22/tcp open ssh 80/tcp open http 443/tcp open https Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 10.
